overall.description: Cinematic drone footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a misty Louisiana bayou swamp. The camera glides over a Victorian greenhouse with ornate stained glass, then moves through dense wetlands with Spanish moss-draped trees, passing period-dressed NPCs before approaching a plantation house.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian greenhouse entrance in bayou swamp

events.description: camera begins ascending to reveal greenhouse roof
emerging from tree cover into more open light above greenhouse

agents.ego_description: smoothly ascending while approaching the ornate greenhouse structure

entered.detail: Victorian greenhouse with ornate stained glass dome and Union Wasp signage
white stone statue of a figure in the garden
decorative black iron fence with stone posts

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at ground level facing a Victorian greenhouse in a misty bayou. The camera ascends smoothly, revealing the ornate stained glass dome and garden statues while emerging from the tree canopy into diffused morning light.

events.description: moving from front facade to roof level

agents.ego_description: gliding over the detailed stained glass roof patterns

entered.detail: green painted wooden rear wall of the greenhouse

segments.scene_description: The camera moves over the intricate stained glass roof of the greenhouse, revealing detailed patterns, then descends behind the structure into the rear garden area where bamboo groves become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense bayou swamp with water pools

events.description: exiting greenhouse area into open swamp wetlands

agents.ego_description: moving through dense vegetation past the greenhouse into the wetlands

entered.detail: murky water pools among the grass
tall cypress trees with Spanish moss

segments.scene_description: Leaving the greenhouse behind, the camera moves through dense swamp vegetation with bamboo groves lining the path. Murky water pools appear among the grass as cypress trees emerge in the distance through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp clearing with scattered oak trees

events.description: fog clears and scene brightens significantly
NPCs in period clothing become visible in the clearing

agents.ego_description: traversing the open swamp toward distant figures

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress standing near tree
two women in long dresses conversing near the path

entered.detail: massive oak tree with sprawling branches
large two-story house with porch visible in distance

segments.scene_description: As the fog lifts and sunlight brightens the scene, the camera moves through an open clearing with scattered oak trees. Women in period dresses stand near the path, and a large plantation house becomes visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: moving along the dirt path toward the large house

entered.detail: covered porch with columns on the mansion
decorative iron gate at the property entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the plantation house along the dirt path, revealing the detailed porch architecture and wrought iron gates as the swamp gives way to the manicured grounds of the estate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a misty Victorian greenhouse and glides through a wild bayou toward a refined plantation estate. It begins at ground level before ascending smoothly to reveal an ornate stained glass dome and garden statues, emerging from the tree canopy into diffused morning light. As the camera descends behind the structure, the scene shifts from the intricate patterns of the roof into the rear gardens where bamboo groves and murky water pools appear among the grass. The camera then pushes forward through the mist and dense cypress trees into an open clearing, where the fog lifts to reveal women in period dresses standing beneath scattered oak trees. Finally, the path opens up as the camera approaches a large plantation house, moving past wrought iron gates as the swampy terrain gives way to manicured estate grounds.
